columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: GCPResourceType
columns.description: The type of GCP resource (e.g., 'CloudRunService', 'CloudRunJob').

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: JsonPayloadMessage
columns.description: The message field extracted from the jsonPayload.

columns.name: JsonPayloadRequest
columns.description: The request field extracted from the jsonPayload.

columns.name: Labels
columns.description: Generic labels associated with the log entry.

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: The name of the log from which the entry originated.

columns.name: PayloadAuthenticationInfoPrincipalSubject
columns.description: The subject identifier of the authenticated principal.

columns.name: PayloadAuthenticationInfoServiceAccountKeyName
columns.description: The name of the service account key used for authentication.

columns.name: PayloadAuthInfoPrincipalEmail
columns.description: The email address of the principal (user or service account) that initiated the action.

columns.name: PayloadAuthorizationInfo
columns.description: Detailed authorization information for the logged action, represented as a Dynamic (JSON) object.

columns.name: PayloadMethodName
columns.description: The name of the API method that was invoked.

columns.name: PayloadRequestBuildpackBuildBaseImage
columns.description: The base image used by the buildpack for the build process.

columns.name: PayloadRequestBuildpackBuildEnableAutomaticUpdates
columns.description: Indicates whether automatic updates are enabled for the buildpack build.

columns.name: PayloadRequestDomainMappingApiVersion
columns.description: The API version of the Cloud Run domain mapping in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestDomainMappingKind
columns.description: The 'kind' of the Cloud Run domain mapping (e.g., 'DomainMapping').

columns.name: PayloadRequestDomainMappingMetadataAnnotations
columns.description: Annotations associated with the Cloud Run domain mapping's request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestDomainMappingMetadataName
columns.description: The name of the Cloud Run domain mapping within the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestDomainMappingMetadataNameSpace
columns.description: The namespace of the Cloud Run domain mapping within the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestDomainMappingSpec
columns.description: The specification details of the Cloud Run domain mapping in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestDomainMappingStatus
columns.description: The status of the Cloud Run domain mapping in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestImageUri
columns.description: The URI of the container image used for the Cloud Run service.

columns.name: PayloadRequestJobApiVersion
columns.description: The API version of the Cloud Run job in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestJobKind
columns.description: The 'kind' of the Cloud Run job (e.g., 'Job').

columns.name: PayloadRequestJobMetadataAnnotations
columns.description: Annotations associated with the Cloud Run job's request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestJobMetadataName
columns.description: The name of the Cloud Run job within the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestJobMetadataNameSpace
columns.description: The namespace of the Cloud Run job within the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestJobSpec
columns.description: The specification details of the Cloud Run job in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestLabelSelector
columns.description: The label selector used in the request, typically for filtering resources.

columns.name: PayloadrequestMetadataCallerIp
columns.description: The IP address of the client that made the request.

columns.name: PayloadrequestMetadatacallerSuppliedUserAgent
columns.description: The user agent String provided by the caller.

columns.name: PayloadrequestMetadataDestinationAttributes
columns.description: Attributes related to the destination of the request.

columns.name: PayloadrequestMetadatarequestAttributesAuth
columns.description: Authentication attributes embedded within the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestMetadataRequestAttributesReason
columns.description: The reason specified in the request attributes metadata.

columns.name: PayloadrequestMetadatarequestAttributesTime
columns.description: The timestamp associated with the request attributes.

columns.name: PayloadRequestName
columns.description: The name of the specific request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestOptionsRequestedPolicyVersion
columns.description: The requested policy version within the request options.

columns.name: PayloadRequestParent
columns.description: The parent resource of the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestRegion
columns.description: The GCP region where the request originated or was processed.

columns.name: PayloadRequestResource
columns.description: The resource specified in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceApiVersion
columns.description: The API version of the Cloud Run service in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceKind
columns.description: The 'kind' of the Cloud Run service (e.g., 'Service').

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceLatestRevision
columns.description: The name of the latest revision for the Cloud Run service in the request status.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataAnnotations
columns.description: Annotations associated with the Cloud Run service's request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataCreationTimestamp
columns.description: The timestamp when the Cloud Run service in the request metadata was created.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataGeneration
columns.description: The generation number of the Cloud Run service in the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadatalabels
columns.description: Labels from the Cloud Run service metadata within the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataName
columns.description: The name of the Cloud Run service within the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataNameSpace
columns.description: The namespace of the Cloud Run service within the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataResourceVersion
columns.description: The resource version of the Cloud Run service in the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataSelfLink
columns.description: The self-link URL for the Cloud Run service in the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceMetadataUID
columns.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the Cloud Run service in the request metadata.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceObservedGeneration
columns.description: The observed generation of the Cloud Run service in the request status.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceReadyRevision
columns.description: The name of the ready revision for the Cloud Run service in the request status.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceServiceURL
columns.description: The URL of the Cloud Run service in the request status.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceSpec
columns.description: The specification details of the Cloud Run service in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceStatusConditions
columns.description: Conditions indicating the current state of the Cloud Run service in the request status.

columns.name: PayloadRequestServiceTraffic
columns.description: Traffic distribution settings for the Cloud Run service in the request status.

columns.name: PayloadRequestStorageSourceGeneration
columns.description: The generation of the storage source used in the request.

columns.name: PayloadRequestType
columns.description: The type of request made to the Cloud Run service.

columns.name: PayloadResourceLocationCurrentLocations
columns.description: Current location(s) of the resource involved in the log entry.

columns.name: PayloadResourceName
columns.description: The name of the GCP resource relevant to the log entry.

columns.name: PayloadResponseApiVersion
columns.description: The API version of the response from the Cloud Run service.

columns.name: PayloadResponseKind
columns.description: The 'kind' of resource returned in the response (e.g., 'Service').

columns.name: PayloadResponseMetadataAnnotations
columns.description: Annotations associated with the response metadata, typically key-value pairs.

columns.name: PayloadResponseMetadataCreationTimestamp
columns.description: The timestamp when the resource in the response metadata was created.

columns.name: PayloadResponseMetadataGeneration
columns.description: The generation number of the resource in the response metadata.

columns.name: PayloadResponseMetadataName
columns.description: The name of the resource within the response metadata.

columns.name: PayloadResponseMetadataResourceVersion
columns.description: The resource version of the resource in the response metadata, indicating its state.

columns.name: PayloadResponseMetadataSelfLink
columns.description: The self-link URL for the resource in the response metadata.

columns.name: PayloadResponseMetadataUID
columns.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the resource in the response metadata.

columns.name: PayloadResponseNameSpace
columns.description: The namespace of the resource within the response.

columns.name: PayloadResponseServiceMetadatalabels
columns.description: Labels from the service metadata within the response.

columns.name: PayloadResponseSpec
columns.description: The specification details of the resource in the response.

columns.name: PayloadResponseStatus
columns.description: The status of the operation or resource in the response.

columns.name: PayloadResponseType
columns.description: The type of response received from the Cloud Run service.

columns.name: PayloadServiceName
columns.description: The name of the GCP service involved in the log entry.

columns.name: PayloadType
columns.description: The type of payload contained within the log entry.

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: The timestamp when the log entry was received by Log Analytics.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsConfigurationName
columns.description: The name of the associated Cloud Run configuration.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsJobName
columns.description: The name of the associated Cloud Run job.

columns.name: ResourceLabelslocation
columns.description: The GCP location of the Cloud Run resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsProjectId
columns.description: The GCP project ID where the Cloud Run resource resides.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsRevisionName
columns.description: The name of the associated Cloud Run revision.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsServiceName
columns.description: The name of the associated Cloud Run service.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: The severity level of the log entry (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR).

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the log entry was originally generated in GCP.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table
